metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Billy Joel - Honesty.flac
metadata.title: Honesty
metadata.lyrics:
[00:08.03] If you search for tenderness
[00:11.54] It isn't hard to find
[00:15.17] You can have the love you need to live
[00:22.25] But if you look for truthfulness
[00:24.79] You might just as well be blind
[00:28.88] It always seems to be so hard to give
[00:36.14] Honesty is such a lonely word
[00:43.36] Everyone is so untrue
[00:50.50] Honesty is hardly ever heard
[00:57.37] And mostly what I need from you
[01:05.18] I can always find someone
[01:08.51] To say they sympathize
[01:12.37] If I wear my heart out on my sleeve
[01:19.31] But I don't want some pretty face
[01:22.25] To tell me pretty lies
[01:26.04] All I want is someone to believe
[01:33.15] Honesty is such a lonely word
[01:40.37] Everyone is so untrue
[01:47.57] Honesty is hardly ever heard
[01:54.54] And mostly what I need from you
[02:01.18] 
[02:05.87] I can find a lover
[02:09.37] I can find a friend
[02:12.88] I can have security until the bitter end
[02:19.94] Anyone can comfort me
[02:22.33] With promises again
[02:25.58] I know, I know
[02:33.17] 
[02:37.26] When I'm deep inside of me
[02:40.72] Don't be too concerned
[02:44.17] I won't ask for nothin' while I'm gone
[02:51.12] But when I want sincerity
[02:53.86] Tell me where else can I turn
[02:57.50] 'Cause you're the one I depend upon
[03:05.97] Honesty is such a lonely word
[03:11.63] Everyone is so untrue
[03:18.76] Honesty is hardly ever heard
[03:25.56] And mostly what I need from you
[03:31.61]
